headline: Applied Materials (AMAT) Is Up 5.7% After Record DRAM Tools, Dividend Hike And AI Supply-Chain Push
summary: In recent days Applied Materials reported fiscal Q1 2026 results highlighting record DRAM equipment revenue of US$1.75 billion, new tools for 2nm gate-all-around transistors, and a Board-approved 15% rise in its quarterly dividend to US$0.53 per share, marking nine consecutive years of dividend increases. These developments, alongside plans to use UPS’s new Taiwan logistics hub as an Asian distribution center and fresh US government support for semiconductor supply chains, underscore how...
